conflict: Silas helped bury Gabriel and is tired, ill, and unwilling to go on being Della's accomplice without forcing her to face what the truth now costs.
consequence: Silas confirms the grave can still expose Gabriel, removing Della's last excuse that uncertainty might save everyone.
must_land_beats: Della and Silas revisit the fever-plot ground in near privacy.
Silas's declining lungs and failing stamina are made concrete.
The past night of Gabriel's burial is partially reconstructed without full exposition dump.
Silas makes clear that silence itself has become a choice with victims.
Della leaves knowing delay will not become mercy by itself.
objective: Find out whether the fever-plot grave can truly be identified if opened under public scrutiny.
